reviews.text:
As wedding venue owners ourselves, we’ve worked with so many talented photographers — but Mallory and Nora with Mallory Munson Photography are truly something special. We own Pikes Peak Ranch, and when it came time for our own wedding, there was no question who we wanted to capture it. They exceeded every expectation and then some.

Our day brought every kind of Colorado weather imaginable — sunshine, wind, rain, smoke — and somehow they managed to make it all look intentional and cinematic. The images they created are breathtaking, emotional, and timeless. Every time we look through our gallery, we’re transported right back to the feeling of the day.

Mallory and Nora’s presence was such a gift. They brought calm energy, joy, and professionalism to every moment, guiding us naturally while letting our personalities and love shine through. They captured every detail, every tear, every laugh — not just what our day looked like, but what it felt like.

We couldn’t be happier with our experience and will cherish these photos for the rest of our lives. For any couple looking for a photographer who can truly tell your story with heart, artistry, and authenticity — look no further than Mallory Munson Photography. She's the absolute best. 🤍

Mallory was a joy to work with from start to finish! She helped us feel comfortable in front of the camera and brought all the good vibes at our engagement shoot and on our wedding day. She is very talented and just a great human to have with you on your special day! We are so grateful to have these gorgeous photos for the rest of our lives!

Mallory’s photo style is timeless, fun, colorful, and surprisingly hard to find from other wedding photographers. When I came across her Instagram for the first time, her photos were exactly what I was looking for, and I was elated when she promptly replied to my inquiry that she was available for my wedding date! Her option for payment installments was very helpful during the wedding planning process, too.

Mallory offered help with timelines beforehand and made sure she knew exactly what shots we were hoping for, which made the day go really smoothly.

On the day of the wedding, Mallory and her best friend Chantelle were so great to work with and brought such a fun energy that shined through in their work! You’d be surprised how much time you end up spending with your photographer on your wedding day, so make sure it’s good company!

The photos speak for themselves for this review! My husband and I have never had professional photos done, but she made us comfortable and captured so many good ones. I was a little reluctant about an idea she had for a shot under a chairlift because I thought it would be difficult to walk there in heels, but OMG was she right! I’m glad I listened to her and can’t wait to get a print of the shot to hang in our home for years to come. Mallory has a talent for photography, and I’m so glad we chose her to document our day.

Mallory Munson is incredible! We were her first wedding of the season, and even though she was jet lagged, she got up at the crack of dawn to photograph our elopement, and showed up with a smile and laughs! It felt like I'd known her for years. She made myself and my husband feel so comfortable, even though we're both typically nervous in front of a camera. She had so many ideas about the best shots to take advantage of the beautiful lighting. And truly, the photos speak for themselves! I couldn't be happier with the photos we've gotten so far: they absolutely captured the magic of the day. I'm so excited for our wedding celebration in September because Mallory will be there to capture that as well. Seriously, she's the best there is!

Thank you so much to Mallory and the team for capturing our wedding day so perfectly. Mallory was responsive and so helpful in coordinating our engagement shoot (she even took a look at our outfits ahead of time at our request), and Menique and Savannah were incredible day-of photographers. We love our engagement and wedding photos, as well as the warm edits! Couldn't have asked for a better team.
